abort.already_configured: All Telegram chats are already configured
abort.no_telegram_bot_entries: No Telegram Bot entries found. Please set up a Telegram Bot configuration before configuring this integration.

data_description.telegram_entry: Select the Telegram Bot configuration to link with this integration.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.
abort.all_telegram_entries_configured: All Telegram Bot entries are already configured. Please reconfigure an existing entry or add a new subentry to the telegram bot integration.

error.telegram_subentry_already_configured: This chat is already configured for another subentry. Please select a different Telegram Bot or reconfigure the existing subentry.

data_description.conversation_agent: Conversation agent to use for this chat.
data_description.telegram_subentry: Telegram subentry to link with this integration.
data_description.user_id: Select a Home Assistant user to link with this Telegram chat.

init.description: Create a subentry for each Telegram chat you want to connect.
init.title: Telegram Chat Configuration

all_telegram_entries_configured.description: Please also remove the corresponding config subentry from the Telegram Bot Conversation integration.
all_telegram_entries_configured.title: Telegram Bot config subentry has been removed

no_telegram_bot_entries.description: Please reconfigure the Telegram Bot integration first, and then reconfigure the Telegram Bot Conversation integration.
no_telegram_bot_entries.title: No Telegram Bot config entries found

data_description.attachments: Minimum number of lines in a code block to be sent as files. Set to 0 to disable the functionality.
data_description.conversation_timeout: Overwrite default conversation timeout for context management. The bot will ignore message history if the chat is interrupted for longer than this time.
data_description.disable_web_page_preview: Disable link previews for links in the message
data_description.mermaid: Render Mermaid diagrams in messages as images.
data_description.thoughts: Include the agent's thoughts as temporary messages before the actual response becomes available.
data_description.tmpdir: Directory to store temporary files while they are being uploaded to Telegram. You can add a new directory in configuration.yaml as allowlist_external_dirs

init.description: Configure options for Telegram Bot conversation.
